# Eternal Fitness

> Private one-to-one personal training studio in Worthing, West Sussex, run by
> Esther Fair, a Level 4 Personal Trainer (the highest mainstream UK PT
> qualification) holding a GP Exercise Referral qualification and a separate
> Level 4 Cancer and Exercise Rehabilitation qualification. Specialises in
> exercise for clinical and complex health populations, not general
> weight-loss or toning.

## Who this is for

People managing hypertension, high cholesterol, COPD, asthma, coronary
artery disease, obesity, type 1/2 diabetes, metabolic syndrome, thyroid
conditions, osteoarthritis, rheumatoid arthritis, osteoporosis, non-specific
lower back pain, post-joint-replacement rehab, mild-moderate depression or
anxiety, cancer (active treatment, remission, or post-surgery), disability,
visual impairment, or neurological conditions (MS, Parkinson's, stroke).
Not for pay-as-you-go gym-goers seeking generic weight loss.

## Key pages

- [Personal Training](https://eternal-fitness.co.uk/personal-training): main service overview
- [Exercise for Health](https://eternal-fitness.co.uk/exercise-for-health): condition-specific programmes hub
- [Cancer Rehabilitation](https://eternal-fitness.co.uk/cancer-rehabilitation): dedicated cancer rehab service
- [About Esther Fair](https://eternal-fitness.co.uk/about): qualifications and approach
- [Pricing](https://eternal-fitness.co.uk/pricing): session and block pricing
- [FAQs](https://eternal-fitness.co.uk/faqs): common questions answered
- [Blog](https://eternal-fitness.co.uk/blog): articles on exercise and health conditions
- [Contact](https://eternal-fitness.co.uk/contact): booking a free consultation

## Pricing

- Single session: £45
- Block of 12 sessions: £480 (£40/session)
- Block of 24 sessions: £840 (£35/session)

## Location & contact

Private studio, Worthing, West Sussex. Phone: 07517 658128.
Email: esther.fair@eternal-fitness.co.uk

## What this business does NOT do

No group classes, no online-only programmes, no active NHS/GP referral
scheme (self-referral only — GPs and physios do not send clients directly).
